bets.game: Greater Western Sydney Giants v Carlton Blues
bets.notes: Self-placed by Jack. Model-implied fair odds 2.52 (got better price at 2.66). Shrunk SR 43.3%, shrunk EV +15.3%, Kelly 0.092. Note: 2 of 3 legs are same player (Acres) — correlated, not fully independent legs.

Self-placed by Jack. CORRECTED: Rachele and Bowey both hit. Rankine's 1+ goal leg (the strongest-edge leg, +16.5, 85.9% model rate) is what missed. This is normal goal-kicking variance, not a calibration failure — goals are a low-base-rate binary stat, so even a well-priced 86% leg will miss roughly 1 in 7 times. Don't read this as the model being wrong; the edge assessment was sound, the bet just lost on variance.
